# SuperDTP

> Enterprise document layout, localisation, and publishing infrastructure for global enterprises and publishers. Operating since 2014 with 60+ in-house specialists across production centres in Bulgaria and India.

SuperDTP delivers production-grade multilingual services spanning desktop publishing, Indic language localisation, eLearning adaptation, PDF accessibility compliance, prepress and typesetting, file preparation, and independent quality assurance. The company acts as a back-office for publishers worldwide and a localisation engine for enterprises expanding into Indian and global markets.

## Services

- [Indic Language Localisation](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/): Enterprise-grade localisation into Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia, and Assamese. Covers corporate documents, marketing collateral, product packaging, software UI, and all publication types. Uses an automated production DTP pipeline for scale.

- [Multilingual DTP](https://www.superdtp.com/multilingual-dtp/): Desktop publishing and layout design across 40+ languages including Indic, Asian (CJK), Middle Eastern (Arabic, Hebrew), and European scripts. Delivers print-ready PDFs for books, magazines, brochures, manuals, catalogues, and marketing materials. Supports InDesign, QuarkXPress, Illustrator, Photoshop, Publisher, and Word.

- [E-learning Localisation](https://www.superdtp.com/e-learning/): Full eLearning course localisation with audio/video synchronisation, graphic and bitmap/vector adaptation, UI/navigation text, and LMS-ready delivery. Supports SCORM, xAPI, and HTML5 formats across Western, non-Western (CJK), and bidirectional (Arabic, Hebrew, Urdu) scripts.

- [File Preparation](https://www.superdtp.com/file-preparation/): Pre-translation document engineering that reduces post-translation DTP effort and cost. Creates print-ready PDFs to exact printer specifications, performs DTP cleanup, standardises styles, and pre-flights documents before translation or printing.

- [Quality Assurance](https://www.superdtp.com/qa/): Independent third-party IQA for online and printed publications. Reviews output against project criteria, provides detailed reports of all findings, and optionally implements corrections during the review process.

- [PDF Accessibility & Remediation](https://www.superdtp.com/pdf-remediation/): Manual PDF remediation for full Section 508, WCAG 2.1/2.2, and ADA compliance. Accessibility specialists personally review every page — adding tags, reading order, alt-text, and document structure that automated tools cannot reliably produce.

- [Prepress & Typesetting](https://www.superdtp.com/prepress/): Publisher back-office for typesetting, pagination, co-edition layouts, scanning/OCR/metadata archival, and picture manipulation. Serves fiction, non-fiction, STM, academic (KS1–KS12), coffee table books, magazines, comic books, B2B, and recipe books.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2014
- Team: 60+ in-house specialists (not outsourced)
- Locations: Bulgaria and India
- Languages: 40+ including all Indic, European, CJK, and RTL scripts
- Software: InDesign, QuarkXPress, Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel, PageMaker, Word, Publisher, Visio
- Cost advantage: Up to 60% savings vs. in-house production
- Availability: 365 days/year, 24/7 schedule with prior booking
- Clients: Startups, SMEs, Fortune 500 and Fortune 1000 companies
